rationale: Educ. Code §43.056 addresses sovereign immunity for a corporation and its officers. It bears no relation to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The corporation, the board of directors, and the officers and employees of the corporation are entitled to sovereign immunity to the same extent as any other state agency or officer or employee of a state agency.
_note: No textual or substantive relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this sovereign immunity provision.
